name_en: 24B Shell Bag Wax Leather. A day of surrendering to its beauty. This shell bag is exquisite whether carried by hand or crossbody. The body is shiny wax leather, bright just right. Carried in hand, it scores full marks for retro cuteness. Come find your retro shell treasure.
